episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: A 60-year-old man masturbating 38 times in one afternoon is specific enough to be believable.
Taking seven grams of mushrooms and calling it microdosing inverts what the term means.
